Tightened Mar 2026: 90d 33.3%WR. minConf=85 for ultra-clean setups. slAtrMult=1.2 Mar 2026: TSLA has fat-tail volatility clusters like SMCI — standard 0.5 ATR stop gets wicked out by Musk-tweet-driven noise before the real move. 1.2 ATR gives breathing room past the wick zone.

Switched SMC→KeyLevel Mar 2026. 365d: 3 exec trades 0%WR — all LOSS. SMCI has massive wicks ($2-4 ATR range) — standard 0.5 ATR stop gets shaken out by noise before the actual move. Increased slAtrMult 0.5→1.2: SL is now 1.2 ATR above/below the key level, past the wick noise. TP scales proportionally (1.5x the wider risk). minConf lowered to 70 to see more setups.

Switched SMC→KeyLevel Mar 2026. 365d: 5 exec trades 0%WR — all 3 BE_STOPs confirm entry direction is right, TP too far. JPM moves in $0.50-1.00 increments then stalls. Reduced tpRrRatio 1.5→1.0: take profit at 1:1 R:R (reached before reversal). ATR-aware SL unchanged (0.5 ATR above/below level).
